title: Special Mobs
description: Discover special mobs with distinct abilities in different dimensions!
body:
## Special Mobs

Dive into a world teeming with unique challenges and encounters with the Special Mobs Data Pack. This data pack enhances your Minecraft experience by introducing a variety of special mobs, each with their own abilities and found in different dimensions.

### Overworld

- Slime Spider
- Barbarian
- Ninja
- Miner
- Robbery
- Ice Shooter
- Water Ghost

### The Nether

- Soul Knight
- Black Knight
- Berserker
- Bastion Guard
- Crimson Aboriginal
- Wither Ghost
- S1enderman
- Fire Spirit

### The End

- Chorus Ghost

**Explore the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/special-mobs/gallery) for more information on these unique creatures.**

<!-- 

### Commands

All special mobs can spawn naturally, but you can also summon them using commands for specific gameplay scenarios:

- `/function spm:kit/summon/<SpecialMob>`: Summons the specified special mob.
- `/function spm:kit/spawn_egg/<SpecialMob>`: Provides a special mob spawn egg.
- `/function spm:kit/spawner/<SpecialMob>`: Grants a special mob spawner.
- `/function spm:kit/setspawner/<SpecialMob>`: Sets the block to a spawner for the chosen special mob.

For minigame creators, you have control over natural spawning:

- `/function spm:config/spawn_naturally_disable`: Disables natural spawning.
- `/function spm:config/spawn_naturally_enable`: Reverts to natural spawning.

### Configuration

Fine-tune your experience by modifying spawning rates, loot tables, and enchantment levels. Access the namespace 'spm_cf' to make adjustments to suit your gameplay preferences.

### Compatibility

This data pack is designed for server-side use and brings a fresh layer of excitement to your Minecraft adventures. Enjoy the challenge and exploration that the special mobs bring to your world.

**Have fun, and happy gaming!**
-->
